extensionDescription.message: AI-powered shopping assistant – browser tool executor for the ShoppingAgent

unknownProduct.description: Fallback name for a product without a name

unknownTool.description: Error when an unknown tool is requested

cartButtonNotFound.message: Add to cart button not found
cartButtonNotFound.description: Error when the add-to-cart button cannot be located on the page

productAdded.description: Success message after adding a product to the cart

cartEmptyOrWrongPage.message: Cart is empty or not on the cart page
cartEmptyOrWrongPage.description: Message when no cart items are found

tabLoadTimeout.description: Error when a tab takes too long to load

logBackgroundToolRequest.description: Console log prefix for background tool requests

logBackgroundLoaded.description: Console log when background service worker is ready

logBridgeLoaded.description: Console log when bridge content script is loaded

logBridgeToolRequest.description: Console log prefix for bridge tool requests

logBridgeError.description: Console log prefix for bridge errors

logBridgeToolResult.description: Console log prefix for bridge tool results

logBridgeWasmReady.description: Console log when WASM app signals readiness

logCoopLoaded.description: Console log when coop content script is loaded

errorProductIdExtraction.message: Could not extract product ID from URL: $URL$
errorProductIdExtraction.description: Error when the product ID cannot be extracted from the URL

errorCsrfTokenNotFound.message: CSRF token not found. Please reload the coop.ch page.
errorCsrfTokenNotFound.description: Error when the CSRF token cannot be found on the page

errorProductNotAvailable.message: Product not available (product code: $CODE$). The product may be out of stock or only available in store. Please try an alternative search term.
errorProductNotAvailable.description: Error when a product is not available for online ordering

errorApiFailed.description: Error for a failed API response

errorFetchTimeout.description: Error when a network request exceeds the timeout

errorProductNotInCart.message: Product "$NAME$" not found in cart. Existing items: $ITEMS$
errorProductNotInCart.description: Error when a product cannot be found in the cart

errorCartEntryUidNotFound.description: Error when the cartEntryUid for a product cannot be found

optionsBridgeHostsLabel.description: Label for the bridge hosts textarea

optionsBridgeHostsHelp.message: URL patterns where the extension bridge content script will be injected. One pattern per line. Use * as wildcard.
